brand.name: The Pizza Bros
brand.description: THE PIZZA BROS is your new local favourite — two mates who live and breathe pizza, serving up fresh-out-of-the-oven slices that'll have you coming back every single week. No fuss, no fluff. Just proper pizza.

hero.headline: Come Hungry. Leave Happy.
hero.subhead: Fresh-out-of-the-oven pizza made with love — because life's too short for average slices.

sections.title: G'day, We're The Pizza Bros
sections.body: We're not here to impress you with fancy words or pretend our pizza is something it's not. It's proper pizza — real dough, real sauce, real toppings — made by two blokes who genuinely reckon pizza is the greatest food on earth. Come hungry, bring mates, and find out why we're fast becoming everyone's new local favourite.

items.title: Fresh Out of the Oven
items.body: Every pizza is made to order and lands on your table (or at your door) straight from a scorching hot oven. No sad, soggy slices here.

items.title: Made With Love
items.body: This isn't a factory. We actually care what goes into every pizza we make — from the base to the last bit of melted cheese.

items.title: Unpretentious & Proud
items.body: No tasting notes, no 'curated experiences' — just bold flavours, generous toppings, and a feed that'll have your eyes rolling back.

items.title: Your New Local Favourite
items.body: Once you've had a Pizza Bros pizza, your old go-to spots start looking a bit average. Don't say we didn't warn ya.

sections.title: What We're Cooking
sections.body: Our menu is all about proper pizza done right. Jump onto our Instagram @pizzabrosau to see the latest pies we're slinging — and trust us, you'll want to screenshot a few.

items.title: Classic Pizzas
items.body: The crowd-pleasers. Margherita, pepperoni, BBQ chook — the classics done better than you'd expect.

items.title: Signature Bros Specials
items.body: This is where we have a bit of fun. Bold combos, generous portions, and the kind of pizzas you'll be telling your mates about.

items.title: Takeaway & Delivery
items.body: Can't make it in? We've got you. Grab a pizza Bros feed from the comfort of your couch.

items.title: Absolute legends
items.body: "Best pizza I've had in ages — fresh, flavourful, and the boys are absolute legends. Already planning my next order."

items.title: My new regular spot
items.body: "Stumbled across them on Instagram and had to give it a go. Not disappointed. This is my new regular spot, full stop."

items.title: Proper pizza
items.body: "Finally — proper pizza without all the wank. Come hungry, they don't skimp on toppings."

sections.title: Track Us Down
sections.body: We're best found on Instagram — give us a follow at @pizzabrosau for the latest updates, specials, and enough cheese-pull content to make your day significantly better. Drop us a DM and we'll sort you out.

footer.blurb: THE PIZZA BROS — Proper pizza, made with love. Follow us @pizzabrosau and come hungry.
